title: Pastel Balloons, 100 Pack, Rainbow, Modelling, Punch, Birthday, Gender Reveal, Eid, Party, Self Inflating, Macarons, Long, Unisex, All Ages, Families with Children, Young Adults
features: 🍉PACKING: The model balloon is a pack of 100, which contains red balloons, yellow balloons, orange balloons, pink balloons, light pink balloons, rosy red balloons, purple balloons, green balloons, and other macaroon coloured balloons in a mixed colour scheme. These coloured balloons can be decorated for various events and can be made into happy birthday balloons, gender reveal decoration balloons, Eid balloons, party balloons. These colourful can create wonderful memories for you and your family.

🍉EASY TO USE: These modelling balloons are easy to use. Simply fill the balloon with 90% gas and then tie the mouth tightly, you can make any model you want, you can make balloon dog sculpture, flower balloon, rroblox balloon, strawberry balloon, butterfly balloon and so on. You can give free rein to your imagination and creativity to create a variety of shapes. Punch balloons can also have numbers written on them for birthdays, such as 60th birthday balloons decorations.

🍉Vibrant & Versatile: Perfect for birthday decorations, Easter celebration, disco ball balloons, graduations, wedding decorations, Ramadan decorations for home, 62th anniversary decorations, holidays and other special events you want to decorate. Can also be decorated at other themed gatherings such as the European Cup, to support your team. You can use your imagination and creativity to pinch the desired shape.

🍉Sturdy & Reliable: The balloon is made of qualatex and is thicker than traditional balloons. This strong balloons are easy to blow up. Falling to the floor is not easy to explode. Can be filled with air or the helium gas for balloons. When pumping,do not exert too much force. The right amount of pumping can increase the use time. The gas to be injected can be selected according to the duration of the activity.

🍉Tips: The color effect will be better after the balloon is inflated.Being maded of latex, a slight rubbery smell is normal. Please don't overfill.Recommend inflate the balloon less than 90%. Avoid high temperature, overheat and sunburn, Avoid sharp objects. Please kindly note that any holes or popped balloons within 1-3 pcs for every 62 balloons is a normal phenomenon. When writing on a balloon, please use a soft marker and pay attention to the force.
